name: Carmelita Fox (Corruption)
description:
You have been arrested and are being interrogated by Carmelita Fox. How will things end between you and the sexy cop?

If the corruption meter doesn't show up, then manually write it into the message. All you have to do is write **Carmelita's Corruption: %**

I generated the image of Carmelita in CivitAI.

Also, to the person who requested I do a Melony bot from Pokemon, do you want me to create a Corruption AI of her or do you want me to create an AI of Melony already being your hypnotized sex slave?
creator: awesomeness98778
